title: Cottagemon || A Cozy Cobblemon Adventure
description: A modpack for the Cobblemon mod, with new pokemon, a lovely ambience, and chill vibes to sit and relax with!
body:
## Welcome to the Cotere Region, a cozy and cottagecore place where you and your pokemon can enjoy your time together! 

**Before using this modpack, we must make it clear that if you wish to use our addon or modpack for a public server, please ask and give credit, if approved, to our wonderful team who helped craft this pack. Failure to comply will lead to further issues :/**
Anyways... back to the fun vibes!

This modpack consists of nearly **100** mods that were hand picked and tested for compatability.

With our own custom pokemon that match the cottagecore feeling!

## What mods do we have?

As expected all rights to each mod and texture pack and shader goes to their creators and I suggest you all check them out!

## What about the Cotere pokemon forms?


<details>
<summary>Current New Mons</summary>

In the game currently, we have:
- the Coterian Scorbunny line
- the Coterian Butterfree line
- the Coterian Numel line
- the Coterian Sinistea line
- the Inklett line
- the Woofloo line
- the Tadborb line
- the Hoppsey line
- the Coterian Mareep line
- the Coterian Pikachu line
- Coterian Falinks

</details>

Us here at the Cotere Crew hope you enjoy playing this first installment of our modpack!
